qa_pairs.question: When can a Group Member access their CCDB account after completing their registration's first step?
qa_pairs.answer: A Group Member can only log in to their CCDB account once their Sponsor has approved their application request, even after completing the first step of registration.

qa_pairs.question: What is the process for a Sponsor to approve a Group Member's account application for the CCDB?
qa_pairs.answer: Once a Group Member confirms their email in Step 1 of registration, their Sponsor will receive an email containing a confirmation link. New application requests will also appear on the Sponsor's CCDB home page. To approve, the Sponsor must click this confirmation link, verify the accuracy of the Group Member's provided information (especially ensuring it's their institutional email), and then click the 'Confirm this role' button.
